---
title: "warden.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tmp_interaction_test/warden.py"
loc: 3
complexity: 1
logic_score: 9.38
style_score: 9.71
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 9.29
---

## Intent
Autonomous neural guardian monitoring system drift and anomalies.

## Interaction Protocol
Instantiate the Warden class and call evaluate(graph) with a compiled matrix graph.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 9.4/10
- **Style [S]**: 9.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 0 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
Minimal internal dependencies.

### Exports
- `TestWarden`
- `evaluate`
